---
title: "in_degree_vector"
generated: true
description: "Per-node in-degree (column sum) -- the adjoint of [`degree_vector`](../nitrix-graph-laplacian/degree_vector.qmd)."
---

[‹ back to `nitrix.graph.laplacian`](../nitrix-graph-laplacian.qmd)

<!-- nitrix:gen sig:in_degree_vector -->
```python
in_degree_vector(A: _GraphInput) -> Num[Array, '... n']
```
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen overview:in_degree_vector -->
Per-node in-degree (column sum) -- the adjoint of [`degree_vector`](../nitrix-graph-laplacian/degree_vector.qmd).

For an asymmetric `A` this is the column sum
$\sum_i A_{ij}$; it equals the (row-sum) out-degree if and only
if `A` is symmetric.  Computed without materialising
$A^{\top}$: dense `A.sum(-2)`;
[`ELL`](../nitrix-sparse.qmd) / [`SectionedELL`](../nitrix-sparse.qmd) via
the additive adjoint matvec applied to the ones vector
($A^{\top} \mathbf{1}$) -- one `O(nnz)` pass over the stored
sparsity pattern (the same adjoint the spectral solvers use for the
$\tfrac{1}{2}(A x + A^{\top} x)$ symmetric matvec).
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen params:in_degree_vector -->
**Parameters**

| parameter | type | shape | default | description |
|------------|--------|--------|----------|--------------------------------------------------------------|
| `A` | `_GraphInput` | — | — | Adjacency operator: dense `(..., n, n)`, [`ELL`](../nitrix-sparse.qmd), or [`SectionedELL`](../nitrix-sparse.qmd). |

**Returns** `Num` — shape `...` × `n`. Per-node in-degree, shape `(..., n)`.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->


<!-- nitrix:gen dims:in_degree_vector -->
**Tensor dimensions**

| dim | meaning |
|---|---|
| `...` | anonymous leading (batch) axes |
| `n` | query points, each an `ndim`-vector coordinate (variadic) |
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->
